CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), TEXT(Account_Type_Stamp__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Account_Type_Stamp__c ))), TEXT(Account_Type_Stamp__c), TEXT(Account__r.Type) ) )
CustomField.label: Account Type
